name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave
syntax: long coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave( dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revisionNoLow, dword revisionNoHigh, dword serialNoLow, dword serialNoHigh );
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions and sends a response if a request is received.
